Bony destruction in congenital syphilis may not lead to pathologic fractures, and may mimic battered child syndrome.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Pediatric Radiology Case of the Week, Virginia Commonwealth University, May 2005
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **E**（錯誤敘述）。先天性梅毒之骨破壞「可以」導致病理性骨折（may lead to pathologic fractures），而非「不會」。A-D 皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[congenital-syphilis-skeletal]]。

questions.questionText: The three common pediatric primary tracheal & bronchial neoplasms are 1) tracheal hemangioma, 2) papillomatosis, 3) carcinoid tumor.
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiologic Clinics of North America Vol 55, Issue 4, July 2017, pp 657-676
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（1+2+3）**。三者皆為常見兒童原發氣管/支氣管腫瘤：hemangioma（聲門下）、papillomatosis（喉部為主）、carcinoid tumor（最常見，中央支氣管）。詳見 [[pediatric-airway-neoplasms]]。

questions.questionText: The accessory cardiac bronchus most commonly arises from which of the following site?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 1
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Medial wall of bronchus intermedius）**。副心臟支氣管最常見起源自中間支氣管內側壁。詳見 [[accessory-cardiac-bronchus]]。

questions.questionText: What is the most characteristic feature of pulmonary involvement of Kaposi's sarcoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 124
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（Peribronchovascular flame-shaped nodules）**。肺 Kaposi sarcoma 最具特徵性表現為支氣管血管周圍火焰狀（ill-defined）結節，雙側大致對稱分布。詳見 [[pulmonary-kaposi-sarcoma]]。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common type of congenital pulmonary adenomatoid malformation (CPAM)?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 6
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Type I）**。CPAM Type I 最常見（~65%），含大囊（>2 cm），預後最佳。詳見 [[cpam-congenital-pulmonary]]。

questions.questionText: Which is the most common type of mediastinal malignant germ cell tumor?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Webb WR, Higgins CB. Thoracic Imaging, 2005 ed., P. 225
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Seminoma）**。Seminoma 為縱膈腔最常見之惡性生殖細胞瘤（約占 40%）。整體而言 mature teratoma 最常見（良性），但 seminoma 為單一組織型態惡性之首。詳見 [[mediastinal-germ-cell-tumors]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of cholelithiasis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. 2-6~2-9
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Comet-tail artifact）**。Comet-tail artifact 為 adenomyomatosis 的特徵，非膽結石典型表現。膽結石典型三聯徵：echogenic foci + posterior acoustic shadow + gravity-dependent movement。詳見 [[cholelithiasis-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of pyogenic liver abscess?

options.text: Vascularity in thick wall portion on color Doppler

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. p 1-42~1-47
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Posterior acoustic shadow）**。Posterior acoustic shadow 為 solid lesion/calcification 特徵，非化膿性肝膿瘍典型表現。肝膿瘍典型表現為 variable echogenicity、irregular border、thick wall vascularity。詳見 [[pyogenic-liver-abscess-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical ultrasound finding of cirrhosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Ahuja A. Diagnostic Imaging: Ultrasound. Amirsys; 2007. p 1-10~1-13
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（Atrophy of caudate lobe）**（錯誤敘述）。肝硬化時 caudate lobe 因獨立靜脈回流而代償性「增大（hypertrophy）」，非萎縮。Nodular contour、increased echogenicity、splenomegaly 皆為典型表現。詳見 [[cirrhosis-ultrasound]]。

questions.questionText: 以下關於超音波融合影像(ultrasound fusion imaging)的描述何者為非？

options.text: 通常超音波與磁振造影(MRI)的對位較電腦斷層(CT)準
在調整對位時，通常超音波的影像與電能斷層/磁振造影的影像會連動
左肝常以左門靜脈的臍部作為標定
右肝常以右門靜脈分叉作為標定

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Lee MW. Ultrasonography 2014;33(4):227-239
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。調整對位時移動的是 CT/MRI 影像，超音波為即時影像不動，兩者不會連動。MRI 對位較 CT 準（A正確），左肝以左門靜脈臍部標定（C正確），右肝以右門靜脈分叉標定（D正確）。詳見 [[ultrasound-fusion-imaging]]。

questions.questionText: 超音波對比劑 Sonazoid 在 Kupffer phase（post-vascular phase）時，微氣泡主要被以下何種細胞吞噬？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Curr Pharm Des. 2012;18(15):2236-52
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（Kupffer cell）**。Sonazoid 為第二代超音波對比劑，約注射 10-15 分鐘後進入 Kupffer phase，微氣泡被庫佛氏細胞吞噬滯留，惡性病灶因缺乏 Kupffer cell 而呈現 defect。詳見 [[us-contrast-agents-sonazoid]]。

questions.questionText: 請問在執行超音波導引射頻電燒(US-guided radiofrequency ablation)時，常使用以下何種方法來治療肝臟穹窿(hepatic dome)的病灶？

options.text: 難以治療，為射頻電燒的禁忌症

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJR Am J Roentgenol. 2008 Jan;190(1):91-8
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B（人工復水 artificial ascites）**。注入生理食鹽水至肝臟表面與橫膈間，改善超音波視窗並作為隔熱層保護橫膈膜。詳見 [[us-guided-rfa-liver]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following types of tissue would have the lowest mean propagation velocity?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Air, 330 m/sec）**。超音波傳播速度：air(330) < fat(1450) < water(1480) < liver(1550) < kidney(1560) < blood(1570) < muscle(1580) < bone(4080 m/s)。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: 1 atmosphere (14.7 psi) = 101325 Pa, which is closest to:
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（100kPa）**。1 atmosphere = 101,325 Pa = 101.325 kPa ≈ 100 kPa。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the following is not a factor determining spatial resolution?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Acquisition）**。影響 spatial resolution 的因素包括 frequency、transmit intensity、pulse interval，但 acquisition 不是。詳見 [[ultrasound-physics-basics]]。

questions.questionText: Avulsion fracture of the medial epicondyle of the humerus may be seen in ___?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p.177
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（young baseball pitcher）**。肱骨內上髁撕裂性骨折好發於年輕棒球投手（Little Leaguer's elbow），因反覆投球 valgus stress 造成。詳見 [[medial-epicondyle-avulsion]]。

questions.questionText: Which of the followings is the least common cause of intestinal obstruction in neonates?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 99
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Acute appendicitis）**。急性闌尾炎極罕見於新生兒。Midgut volvulus、duodenal atresia、annular pancreas 皆為新生兒腸阻塞常見原因。詳見 [[neonatal-intestinal-obstruction]]。

questions.questionText: According to Salter-Harris classification, which type of fracture refers to fracture involving the physis only?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 174
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A（Type 1）**。Salter-Harris Type I = 僅通過生長板（physis only）的骨折，X光可能正常。詳見 [[salter-harris]]。

questions.questionText: According to Salter-Harris classification, which type of fracture consists of a crush injury to part or all of a physis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 175
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Type 5）**。Salter-Harris Type V = 生長板壓碎傷（crush injury），X光可能初期正常，診斷常為回顧性。詳見 [[salter-harris]]。

questions.questionText: According to grading system for vesicoureteral reflux, ___ is defined by the presence of a very tortuous, dilated ureter.
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Fundamentals of Pediatric Radiology, p. 146
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **D（Grade V reflux）**。Grade V = 嚴重擴張的輸尿管及腎盂腎盞系統 + 輸尿管迂曲（tortuous）+ 乳頭壓痕消失。詳見 [[vesicoureteral-reflux-grading]]。

questions.questionText: About inflammatory lesions of the temporal bone, which one is correct?

options.text: External auditory canal cholesteatoma is a rare lesion with an incidence of approximately 1%-5%.
Keratosis obturans often occurs in younger patients and tends to be bilateral.
Necrotizing or malignant otitis externa most commonly occurs in young female without underlying disease.
External auditory canal cholesteatoma can be easily differentiated from entities such as carcinoma and otitis externa.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2013; 269:17-33
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。Keratosis obturans 好發 <40 歲年輕人，50% 雙側。A 錯（EAC cholesteatoma 發生率約 0.1-0.5%，非 1-5%）。C 錯（necrotizing OE 好發老年糖尿病/免疫低下，非年輕女性）。D 錯（影像非特異性，可被 carcinoma 和 OE 模擬）。詳見 [[temporal-bone-inflammatory]]。

questions.questionText: About temporal bone fracture, which one is incorrect?

options.text: The transverse fracture type is more common.
Classification of temporal bone fractures is according to their orientation relative to the long axis of the petrous pyramid.
A transverse fracture is associated with a higher risk of facial nerve injury.
Conductive hearing loss after temporal bone trauma is usually related to hemotympanum or tympanic membrane rupture, rather than ossicular chain disruption.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。**Longitudinal fracture 才是最常見（70-80%）**，非 transverse。B、C、D 皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[temporal-bone-fracture]]。

questions.questionText: About large vestibular aqueduct syndrome, which one is correct?

options.text: Rarely occurs simultaneously with other inner ear abnormalities.
Large vestibular aqueduct is the most common findings on CT for pediatric patient with sensorineural hearing loss.
No genetic cause has been found.
The vestibular aqueduct was considered enlarged when it measured greater than 0.6 mm at the midpoint at tomography greater than 1.5 mm.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **B**。LVA 是兒童 SNHL CT 上最常見的發現。A 錯（常合併其他內耳異常）。C 錯（SLC26A4 基因突變約 27%）。D 的敘述其實是 LVA 的判定標準描述，但選項語句不完整（missing "or"），且 B 為最佳正確答案。詳見 [[large-vestibular-aqueduct]]。

questions.questionText: About otosclerosis, which one is correct?

options.text: CT is not useful for identifying causes of post-stapedectomy failure.
Retrofenestral otosclerosis rarely occurs in isolation and is almost always seen in association with fenestral otosclerosis.
Retrofenestral otosclerosis manifests as a characteristic "halo" around the oval window.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiology 2015; 276:655-672
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**。Retrofenestral otosclerosis 幾乎不單獨出現，通常伴隨 fenestral 病變。A 錯（frequently bilateral）。B 錯（CT 可用於評估 post-stapedectomy failure）。D 錯（retrofenestral 表現為 cochlea 周圍 halo，非 oval window）。詳見 [[otosclerosis]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is contraindication of intra-arterial thrombectomy?

options.text: The Alberta stroke programme early CT score = 6
The National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale = 6

questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C（mRS = 6）**。Modified Rankin Scale 6 = 死亡，為絕對禁忌症。ASPECTS 6 仍可考慮治療（美國建議 ≥6），NIHSS 6 在治療範圍內，GCS 6 非特定禁忌。詳見 [[intra-arterial-thrombectomy]]。

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about Fahr Disease?

options.text: Bilateral symmetric calcifications in basal ganglia.
The calcification is usually hyperintense on T1WI.
Onset of clinical symptoms is typically 30-60 years.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic Imaging, Brain, Third edition, p.876-879
questions.explanation: 正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。Fahr disease 有文獻報告存在 infantile form，"no infantile form" 為不正確。A（雙側對稱基底核鈣化）、B（T1WI 高訊號）、D（30-60 歲發病）皆為正確敘述。詳見 [[fahr-disease]]。

questions.questionText: Which nerve injury does NOT cause muscle atrophy?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiopaedia: cranial nerves
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（前庭耳蝸神經）。CN VIII 為純感覺神經（聽覺＋平衡），無運動纖維，損傷不會造成去神經化肌肉萎縮。CN V（咀嚼肌）、CN VII（面部表情肌）、CN XII（舌肌）損傷皆可致肌肉萎縮。

→ [[cranial-nerve-muscle-atrophy]]

questions.questionText: Which one is WRONG about location of tuber cinereum?

options.text: Between optic chiasm and mammillary body

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic and surgical imaging anatomy: brain, head & neck, spine. P.88
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。Tuber cinereum 位於 mammillary body **前方**（anterior），非後方。它是介於 optic chiasm 與 mammillary body 之間的間腦膜，infundibulum 自此向下延伸至垂體柄。

→ [[hypothalamic-anatomy]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following structures makes up the boundary of the perineum?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（薦結節韌帶）。會陰邊界：前方 pubic symphysis、前外側 ischiopubic ramus、**後外側 sacrotuberous ligament**、後方 coccyx/sacrum。A/B/D 皆為會陰區域肌肉，非邊界結構。

→ [[perineum-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging findings allows differentiation of a urethral diverticulum from other periurethral cystic lesions?

options.text: Direct continuity with the urethral lumen

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。尿道憩室與尿道管腔直接相通為其獨特鑑別特徵。Gartner duct cyst（陰道近端前外側）、Bartholin gland cyst（恥骨聯合以下後外側）、Skene duct cyst（外尿道口旁）均不與尿道管腔相通。

→ [[urethral-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: What artery is the major blood supply to the perineum?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（內陰部動脈）。Internal pudendal artery 為內髂動脈前分支，是會陰區的主要血液供應。

→ [[perineum-anatomy-imaging]]

questions.questionText: What imaging modality is best for evaluation of urethral injury?

options.text: CT with intravenous contrast material, delayed phase

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（透視引導逆行性尿道攝影）。RUG 為評估尿道損傷之 gold standard。CT cystography / fluoroscopic cystography 用於膀胱損傷。

→ [[urethral-injury-imaging]]

questions.questionText: What imaging modality is best for initial evaluation of scrotal injury?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2018 Jul-Aug;38(4):1111-1130
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（超音波）。US 為陰囊損傷初始評估首選：快速、無輻射、可即時評估睪丸完整性與血流。

→ [[scrotal-trauma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the classic radiological signs of ureter stricture is WRONG?

options.text: Balloon on a string sign: Dilation of the renal collecting system and proximal ureter classically seen in UVJ obstruction >> UPJ
Sawtooth appearance of the ureter: Occurs in patients with TB involvement of the ureter characterized by luminal irregularity with areas of narrowing and dilation
Pipe stem ureter: Occurs later in the course of tuberculous involvement of the ureter with the ureter rigid and straight
Corkscrew or beaded ureter: Seen after healing and fibrosis in patients with tuberculous involvement of the ureter

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging, chap 63 Benign and Malignant Ureteral Strictures
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。Balloon on a string sign 經典見於 **UPJ 阻塞**，非 UVJ。選項敘述「UVJ obstruction >> UPJ」方向反了。

→ [[ureter-stricture-signs]]

questions.questionText: Renal venous thrombosis is sometimes seen in radiological studies. Which of the following statement regarding to the cause of renal venous thrombosis is incorrect?

options.text: Renal vein thrombosis in adults usually is due to a hypercoagulable state, most commonly nephrotic syndrome.
In children, it is usually associated with sepsis and dehydration
Neoplastic invasion of the renal vein is more common in metastatic renal tumors than in primary renal tumors.
Mechanical compression of renal vein from abscess, tumor, lymphadenopathy, and aneurysm will cause renal venous thrombosis.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 65 Renal Vascular Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。腫瘤性腎靜脈侵犯在**原發性腎腫瘤（RCC）**比轉移性腎腫瘤更常見，選項 C 敘述反了。

→ [[renal-venous-thrombosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following signs is not a classic finding of renal TB?

options.text: End-stage renal parenchymal disease manifesting as a calcified putty kidney

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 64 Diffuse Renal Parenchymal Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（Rice bodies）。Rice bodies 為**關節結核（TB arthritis）**之關節腔內特徵，非泌尿系統結核。腎結核經典表現包括乳頭壞死(A)、漏斗狹窄合併局部腎盞擴張(C)、灰泥腎(D)。

→ [[renal-tuberculosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following imaging strategy for acute pyelonephritis (APN) is least appropriate?

options.text: CT is appropriate in adult patient who are diabetic, immunocompromised or complicated.
Reflux study is appropriate in pediatric patient who had suspected functional disorder of urinary system.
CT or MRI is appropriate in pediatric patient who had repeated pyelonephritis without definite findings in reflux study.
CT is important in patient with simple APN to exam the extend of infection.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 64 Diffuse Renal Parenchymal Diseases
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（最不適當）。單純性 APN 不需常規 CT 評估感染範圍。CT 主要適用於複雜性、糖尿病/免疫低下(A)、或兒童反覆發作(C)。

→ [[acute-pyelonephritis-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the RCC is WRONG?

options.text: Small RCCs (<3 cm) are more likely to be hyperechoic, which can lead to misdiagnosis as angiomyolipoma.
Despite their large size, chromophobe RCCs are homogeneously hyperechoic on ultrasonography
Preoperative CT is more than 90% accurate in staging RCC, and distinguishes T2 from T3a lesions easily by observing perinephric stranding.
A chest radiograph is usually sufficient in the initial staging of RCC if the primary tumor is small (<3 cm)

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Abdominal imaging chap 63 Benign, Malignant, and Cystic Focal Renal Lesions
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。CT 術前分期整體準確度高，但**無法可靠由 perinephric stranding 區分 T2 與 T3a**。腎周脂肪條紋可見於水腫/血管充血等非侵犯因素。

→ [[renal-cell-carcinoma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical MRI finding of endometrial cancer?

options.text: Intermediate signal intensity on T2WI relative to normal endometrium
Isointensity on T1WI relative to myometrium
Low signal intensity on ADC map

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 2-140~2-141
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（非典型表現）。子宮內膜癌在 T1C+(Gd) 增強後**強化程度低於正常子宮內膜**，非高增強。A（T2WI 中等訊號）、B（T1WI 等訊號）、C（ADC 低訊號）皆為典型表現。

→ [[endometrial-cancer-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT correct considering staging of endometrial cancer?

options.text: Intact junctional zone is suggestive of absence of deep myometrial invasion
Disruption of low signal intensity cervical stroma is suggestive of cervical invasion
Disruption of outer low signal line of uterus is suggestive of serosal invasion
Bullous edema of urinary bladder wall is suggestive of bladder mucosal invasion > cystitis

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 2-150~2-152
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（不正確敘述）。膀胱壁水泡狀水腫（bullous edema）提示膀胱炎（cystitis），而非膀胱黏膜侵犯。

→ [[endometrial-cancer-mri]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian mucinous cystadenoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 7-54~7-59
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。"Spider web" appearance 為**腹膜包裹性囊腫（peritoneal inclusion cyst）**之特徵。黏液性囊腺瘤特徵為體積大(A)、多房(B)、"stained glass" appearance(D)。

→ [[ovarian-mucinous-cystadenoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian fibrothecoma?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007. p 7-28~7-31
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。纖維莢膜瘤因富含纖維基質，動態增強呈**延遲弱增強（delayed weak enhancement）**，非早期增強。A/B/D 皆為典型表現。

→ [[ovarian-fibrothecoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a typical image finding of ovarian mature cystic teratoma?

options.text: High signal intensity on T1WI without fat saturation

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Hricak H. Diagnostic Imaging: Gynecology. 2007
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。T2WI shadowing（shading sign）為**子宮內膜異位瘤（endometrioma）**特徵（含鐵血黃素致 T2 訊號降低），非成熟囊性畸胎瘤。

→ [[ovarian-mature-cystic-teratoma]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement regarding to the echo appearance of bowel wall is correct?

options.text: Bowel lumen is well-demonstrated under echo, especially when air is present.
Under most circumstances, US could identify five bowel wall layers

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 16, fig 16-5
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。腸壁超音波五層（gut signature）：superficial mucosa(高)/deep mucosa(低)/**submucosa(高,最亮最厚)**/muscularis propria(低)/serosa(高)。A 錯（空氣干擾回音）、B 錯（muscularis mucosae 為低回音）、D 為部分正確但非最佳答案（大多情況可辨 5 層，但考慮腸氣干擾）。

→ [[bowel-wall-layers]]

questions.questionText: Which finding is the clue to rotational abnormalities of the bowel?

options.text: Superior mesenteric vein positioned to the right of the SMA
SMA initially courses to the left rather than right
Duodenum crosses midline between the aorta and SMA
Small bowel located in the right abdomen, large bowel on the left

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 16 BOX 16-1
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。小腸位於右側腹部、大腸位於左側腹部是腸道旋轉異常最具診斷價值的線索。A/B/C 為正常解剖配置或非特異性發現。

→ [[bowel-rotational-abnormalities]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following state describes typical morphological change of cirrhosis?

options.text: Left lateral segment hypertrophy, caudate lobe hypertrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypertrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypotrophy and expanded gallbladder fossa.
Left lateral segment hypotrophy, caudate lobe hypotrophy and tight gallbladder fossa.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 12 Fig 12-34
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。肝硬化典型形態變化：left lateral segment **肥大**（hypertrophy）、caudate lobe **肥大**（hypertrophy）、gallbladder fossa **擴張**（expanded）。Right lobe 則萎縮。

→ [[cirrhosis-morphology-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statement about common collaterals of portal hypertension is incorrect?

options.text: Esophageal and paraesophageal varices are typically supplied by left gastric (coronary) vein.
Gastric varices are typically supplied by left gastric (coronary) vein and short gastric veins.
Paraumbilical varices are typically supplied by mesenteric veins.
Left renal vein shunts are typically supplied by gastric (gastrorenal shunt) and splenic (splenorenal shunt) veins

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 12 table 12-9
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。Paraumbilical varices 由 **paraumbilical veins（Inf. Vein of Sappey）** 供應，非 mesenteric veins。

→ [[portal-hypertension-collaterals]]

questions.questionText: About the incidence of US findings in patient with acute pancreatitis, which of the following order is correct (from highest to lowest)?

options.text: Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass > Venous thrombosis
Venous thrombosis > Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass
Peripancreatic inflammation > Venous thrombosis > Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass
Focal mass > Peripancreatic inflammation > Indistinct ventral margin > Venous thrombosis

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Problem Solving in Abdominal Imaging, First Edition, chap 14 table 14-2
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。急性胰臟炎超音波發現頻率排序：Peripancreatic inflammation（最常見）> Indistinct ventral margin > Focal mass > Venous thrombosis（最少見）。

→ [[acute-pancreatitis-ultrasound]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT the portosystemic collaterals pathways area?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；World Journal of Gastroenterology, March 14, 2017 Volume 23 Issue 10
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（十二指腸）。主要門體側枝通路為：EV/GV（食道/胃）、直腸、臍旁（caput medusae）、後腹膜、肝裸區。十二指腸不在經典側枝通路中。

→ [[portal-hypertension-collaterals]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the ancillary features favoring benignity in liver tumors?

options.text: Iron in mass, more than liver.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37:1994-2017
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。Iron in mass more than liver 為 LI-RADS ancillary feature favoring **benignity**。B（nodule-in-nodule）、C（corona enhancement）、D（non-enhancing capsule）皆為 favoring malignancy/HCC 之特徵。

→ [[li-rads-ancillary-benignity]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following concerning renal lymphoma is False?

options.text: Can present as bilateral nephromegaly without any focal lesions.

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。腎臟淋巴瘤為 **hypovascular**，非 hypervascular。Vessels invasion 亦非其典型特徵。A/B/C 皆正確。

→ [[renal-lymphoma-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which disease can be characterized with air trapping in the appearance of mosaic lung attenuation?
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（小氣道疾病）。Air trapping 合併 mosaic lung attenuation 為小氣道疾病之典型表現。呼氣相可確認 air trapping。

→ [[small-airway-disease-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 根據 revised ATS/ERS/JRS/ALAT diagnostic criteria for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis，下列 pattern 何者錯誤?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Respir Res. 2013; 14(Suppl 1): S2
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。ATS/ERS/JRS/ALAT IPF 診斷標準的 HRCT pattern 分類為：UIP pattern、Possible UIP pattern、Inconsistent with UIP pattern。**NSIP pattern 不在此分類中** — NSIP 為獨立的 IIP 亞型。

→ [[ipf-uip-pattern-criteria]]

questions.questionText: 下列 pulmonary nodules 的描述何者錯誤?

options.text: Solid nodule 指 size<3 cm 實質化的結節。
Subsolid nodule 專指部分 solid、部分 ground glass component 的結節，不包含 pure ground glass nodule。
Ground glass nodule 指其 density 比一般肺高，但比 soft tissue density 低。
Perifissural nodule 指鄰近 lung fissure 的結節。

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Radiographics. 2014 Oct;34(6):1658-1679; Radiology. 2017 Jul;284(1):228-243
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。Subsolid nodule 涵蓋 part-solid nodule **和** pure ground-glass nodule 兩者，選項 B 稱「不包含 pure GGN」為錯誤。

→ [[pulmonary-nodule-classification]]

questions.questionText: Which choice is false about image findings of mycobacterial infection?

options.text: Primary tuberculosis demonstrates radiologic findings that include lymphadenopathy, consolidation, pleural effusion, and miliary nodules.
Postprimary tuberculosis demonstrates consolidations that are predominant in the apical and upper lung zones, nodules, and cavitation.
Lymphadenopathy in tuberculosis typically demonstrates a low-attenuation center with peripheral rim enhancement on contrast material-enhanced CT images.
Classic (cavitary) nontuberculous mycobacterial infection can have an appearance and clinical manifestations indistinguishable from those of postprimary tuberculosis.
Miliary tuberculosis is spread by endobronchial spreading, as demonstrated by the finding of a miliary nodule centered on a small bronchiole.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37(1):52-72
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（錯誤敘述）。Miliary TB 經由**血行散播（hematogenous dissemination）**，非支氣管內散播（endobronchial）。Miliary nodules 為 random distribution，非 centrilobular。Endobronchial spread 才會產生 tree-in-bud pattern。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Which choice is false about mediastinal and pleural MR imaging?

options.text: Early arterial phase images are critical for detection of enhancement of mediastinal soft-tissue lesions.
Lesions that demonstrate foci of enhancement, whether nodular, circumferential, septate, diffuse, or heterogeneous, cannot be considered benign mediastinal cysts by their MR appearance.
The two key MR imaging features that can be used to direct biopsy are areas of enhancement and diffusion restriction.
Enhancement within a thrombus should be considered diagnostic of tumor and is best identified in the portal venous phase.
Signal intensity index was recently shown to be of benefit in thoracic MR imaging for evaluating thymic hyperplasia.

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2017; 37(1):52-72
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。縱膈腔軟組織病灶的增強偵測不依賴早期動脈相 — 延遲相更重要。B/C/D/E 皆為正確敘述。SII = [(tSIin - tSIop) / tSIin] × 100%。

→ [[mediastinal-pleural-mri]]

questions.questionText: Regarding the WHO 2016 classification of medulloblastoma molecular subtypes, which one is WRONG?

options.text: WNT-activated: centered in cerebellar peduncle/CPA, best prognosis
Group 3: midline, good prognosis with well-defined margins
Group 3: poor prognosis with ill-defined margins and extensive enhancement

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2018; 38:37-55
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（錯誤敘述）。Group 3 medulloblastoma 預後**最差**，呈邊界不清 (ill-defined) 且顯著增強，並非 good prognosis with well-defined margins。

→ [[medulloblastoma-subtypes]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following statements about pediatric hepatic neoplasms is INCORRECT?

options.text: Hepatic neoplasms are the most common intraabdominal tumor in children
Hepatoblastoma is the most common malignant hepatic tumor in children < 5 years
HCC is more common in older children with underlying liver disease

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e3, Ch91 P.838-850
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。兒童最常見腹腔內腫瘤為**神經母細胞瘤 (neuroblastoma)**，非肝臟腫瘤。

→ [[hepatic-neoplasm-pediatric]]

questions.questionText: Regarding esophageal atresia, which of the following is correct?

options.text: Associated with VACTERL and CHARGE associations
Polyhydramnios with small or absent stomach bubble on prenatal US
Presence of bowel gas indicates fistula status

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e2, Ch96 P.901-910
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆是）。EA 與 VACTERL/CHARGE 相關(A)、產前 polyhydramnios + 胃泡縮小/消失(B)、腹部有腸氣代表有 distal TEF(C) 皆正確。

→ [[esophageal-atresia]]

questions.questionText: Regarding vesicoureteral reflux (VUR), which statement is INCORRECT?

options.text: VCUG is the standard imaging for diagnosis and grading
VUR grading ranges from I to V
It is NOT necessary to evaluate bowel and bladder dysfunction

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Caffey's Pediatric Diagnostic Imaging, e3, Ch119 P.1148-1156
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**（錯誤敘述）。評估 BBD 是 VUR 管理中**必要**的一環，BBD 存在會降低 VUR 自然緩解率。

→ [[vur-pediatric]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following best describes Mirizzi syndrome?

options.text: CBD stone causing pancreatic duct obstruction
Gallstone impaction in cystic duct causing CBD compression
Gallstone impaction in GB neck compressing adjacent CHD with intrahepatic bile duct dilation

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。Mirizzi syndrome 為膽囊頸部結石嵌塞，外在壓迫鄰近總肝管 (CHD)，導致肝內膽管擴張。

→ [[mirizzi-syndrome]]

questions.questionText: What is the most significant complication of wandering spleen?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（脾扭轉致缺血）。游離脾最嚴重併發症為脾蒂扭轉導致脾臟缺血壞死，需緊急處理。

→ [[wandering-spleen]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common form of intracranial tuberculosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（結核性腦膜炎）。顱內結核最常見形式為 tuberculous meningitis，好發於顱底蛛網膜下腔 (basal cisterns)，可合併 dystrophic calcification。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Regarding digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) and architectural distortion (AD), which statement is WRONG?

options.text: AD is less commonly detected on DBT than on 2D mammography
DBT can reduce false positive recall rates
DBT provides better tissue overlap resolution
DBT is useful for characterizing focal asymmetries

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2015; 35:975-990
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（錯誤敘述）。Architectural distortion 在 DBT 上偵測率**更高**（非更低），因 DBT 去除組織重疊，使 AD 更容易辨識。

→ [[breast-tomosynthesis]]

questions.questionText: What is the most common congenital abnormality of the GI tract?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（梅克爾憩室）。Meckel diverticulum 為最常見 GI 先天異常，盛行率約 2%。遵循 rule of 2s：2% 人口、距 ileocecal valve 2 feet、2 inches 長。

→ [[meckel-diverticulum]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a cause of small bowel obstruction (SBO)?

options.text: All of the above can cause SBO

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2009; 29:423-439
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **E**（以上皆可造成 SBO）。Adhesion、hernia、Crohn disease、intussusception 皆為 SBO 之已知原因。

→ [[sbo-causes-imaging]]

questions.questionText: Renal angiomyolipoma (AML) is most commonly associated with which condition?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（結節性硬化症）。腎 AML 與 TSC 高度相關，TSC 患者中 AML 常為多發、雙側。

→ [[renal-aml-tuberous-sclerosis]]

questions.questionText: A patient presents with thumb pain due to nerve compression. Which nerve root is most likely involved?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；Diagnostic Neuroradiology, Osborn P.121
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B（C6）**。拇指皮節對應 C6 神經根。C5 = 上臂外側（deltoid area），C7 = 中指，C8 = 小指。

→ [[cervical-nerve-root-dermatome]]

questions.questionText: Regarding basilar artery occlusion, which of the following is correct?

options.text: Proximal segment occlusion is most common

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（以上皆是）。BAO 以近端阻塞最常見(A)、可致雙側丘腦梗塞(B)、與 ICAS 高度相關(C)。

→ [[basilar-artery-occlusion]]

questions.questionText: 關於結核病傳播途徑，下列何者為非？

options.text: Hematogenous spread plays important role in early stages of initial/primary infection
Lymphatic dissemination incidence in postprimary TB is low due to enhanced acquired immunity
Increasing incidence of primary TB in adults and postprimary TB in immunocompromised
Miliary CT findings represent hematogenous dissemination with random pattern micronodules

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **1**（錯誤敘述）。初期/原發感染早期重要的傳播途徑是**淋巴性傳播 (lymphatic spread)**，非血行性傳播。血行性傳播（粟粒性）較晚發生。

→ [[mycobacterial-infection-imaging]]

questions.questionText: 根據 2015 年 ATA guideline，下列何者為 high suspicious sonographic patterns for malignancy?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；2015 ATA Management Guidelines
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D（1,3,4）**。High suspicious patterns: (1) hypoechoic + irregular margin、(3) hypoechoic + taller-than-wide、(4) interrupted rim calcification with soft tissue extrusion。(2) isoechoic + regular margin 非 high suspicion、(5) spongiform 為 very low suspicion。

→ [[ata-thyroid-guideline]]

questions.questionText: May-Thurner syndrome means:

options.text: Left renal vein between SMA and aorta
Third portion of duodenum compressed between SMA and aorta
Compression of celiac artery by median arcuate ligament
Left common iliac vein compressed between right common iliac artery and fifth lumbar vertebra

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。May-Thurner syndrome：左髂總靜脈被夾於右髂總動脈與第五腰椎之間。A = Nutcracker syndrome、B = SMA syndrome、C = Median arcuate ligament syndrome。跨年重複 2018-150。

→ [[may-thurner]]

questions.questionText: 有關 Maffucci's syndrome，下列何者正確？

options.text: Multiple enchondroma 與 soft tissue sarcoma
常合併有 soft tissue hemangioma

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C**。Maffucci syndrome = 多發性內生軟骨瘤 (multiple enchondromas) + **軟組織血管瘤 (soft tissue hemangiomas)**，非 sarcoma。

→ [[enchondromatosis]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is true regarding complete D-transposition of the great arteries (D-TGA)?

options.text: There is atrioventricular concordance and ventriculoarterial discordance
Aorta is anterior and slightly leftward to PA
Newborns are asymptomatic if VSD intact

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**。D-TGA = AV concordance (RA→RV, LA→LV) + VA discordance (RV→Aorta, LV→PA)。B 錯（corrected TGA = L-TGA）、C 錯（偏右非偏左）、D 錯（intact septum 嚴重發紺）。

→ [[d-tga]]

questions.questionText: About MR Elastography, which one is wrong?

options.text: Edge effects, partial volume, CSF contamination need to be minimized
In NPH, MRE showed increased brain stiffness in cerebrum, especially occipital lobe

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**（錯誤敘述）。MR Elastography 為**非侵入性 (non-invasive)** MRI 技術，利用外部振動源產生 shear wave 量測組織硬度。

→ [[mr-elastography-brain]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is classically seen with sigmoid volvulus?

options.text: Dilated sigmoid directed toward right hemidiaphragm
Transverse colon cranial to sigmoid colon

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B**。Sigmoid volvulus 經典表現：擴張的乙狀結腸朝右側橫膈方向延伸（coffee bean sign / inverted U sign）。

→ [[colon-volvulus]]

questions.questionText: 根據 2015 年 ATA guideline，下列何種 thyroid nodules 建議接受 fine needle aspiration?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；2015 ATA Management Guidelines
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **C（2,3,4）**。FNA 建議閾值：(2) intermediate ≥ 1 cm、(3) low ≥ 1.5 cm、(4) very low ≥ 2 cm。(1) high suspicious 閾值為 ≥ 1 cm（非 0.5 cm）、(5) benign 不需 FNA。

→ [[ata-thyroid-guideline]]

questions.questionText: The risk of bowel incarceration in hernias, from high to low:

options.text: Inguinal hernia (direct) > Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Femoral hernia
Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Inguinal hernia (direct) > Femoral hernia
Femoral hernia > Inguinal hernia (direct) > Inguinal hernia (indirect)
Femoral hernia > Inguinal hernia (indirect) > Inguinal hernia (direct)

questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2011; 31:E1-E12
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**。嵌頓風險由高到低：Femoral > Indirect inguinal > Direct inguinal。股疝股環狹窄堅硬，嵌頓風險最高。

→ [[hernia-incarceration-risk]]

questions.questionText: An 8-month-old male infant with contracted skull base, small foramen magnum, rhizomelic shortening, trident hands, brachydactyly, progressive interpedicular narrowing at lumbar spine, short pedicles, and flat-roofed acetabula. Most likely diagnosis?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（軟骨發育不全）。Achondroplasia 典型特徵：contracted skull base、small foramen magnum、rhizomelic shortening、trident hand、brachydactyly、腰椎 interpedicular distance 漸縮、short pedicles、flat-roofed acetabula。其他選項（achondrogenesis、thanatophoric dysplasia）多為致死性。

→ [[achondroplasia]]

questions.questionText: 目前 IA mechanical thrombectomy 的最高 Strength of Evidence?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AHA guideline 2015
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A（1a）**。根據 AHA 2015 guideline，mechanical thrombectomy 之 Class I; Level of Evidence A（最高等級）recommendation。

→ [[intra-arterial-thrombectomy]]

questions.questionText: A large infiltrative hepatic mass demonstrating early enhancement and portal vein invasion is most consistent with which of the following?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **D**（肝細胞癌）。HCC 典型特徵為動脈期早期增強 (arterial enhancement) 合併門脈侵犯 (portal vein invasion/tumor thrombus)。Cholangiocarcinoma 通常延遲增強；lymphoma 通常低血管性；biliary cystadenoma 為囊性病灶。

→ [[infiltrative-hcc]]

questions.questionText: AJCC 8th edition 對於頭頸癌之分期有哪些重大改變？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, 8th Edition
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **B（2,3）**。重大改變：(2) p16-positive OPC 有獨立 TNM 分期、(3) extranodal extension 影響 N 分期。(1) 口腔癌 tumor thickness 取代 depth of invasion 非此題範圍表述方式、(4) 口咽癌須量測 DOI 之敘述形式與正確答案不符。

→ [[ajcc-head-neck-8th]]

questions.questionText: Which of the following is the most common anatomical variant of the pancreas?
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；RadioGraphics 2006; 26:715-731
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **A**（Pancreas divisum）。Pancreas divisum 為最常見胰臟解剖變異，盛行率 5-10%。由胚胎期腹側與背側胰管未融合所致。

→ [[pancreas-divisum]]

questions.questionText: 下列有關 Cone beam CT (CBCT) 與 MDCT 比較，何者為非？
questions.reference: 2019 交換考詳解；AJNR Am J Neuroradiol 37:481-86
questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **2**（錯誤敘述）。CBCT 的 temporal resolution **低於** MDCT（旋轉速度較慢）。其餘皆正確：spatial resolution 較高(1)、重建時間較長(3)、scatter artifact 較多(4)。

→ [[cbct-vs-mdct]]

questions.questionText: 下列何者有誤？關於 accessory breast tissue

options.text: Accessory breast tissue is residual breast tissue from normal embryologic development
Accessory breast tissue can be found in up to 36% of the population
The highest incidence occurs in Japanese population, lowest in white individuals
Supernumerary breasts are found along the milk line from anterior axillary folds to inguinal region and medial thigh
Aberrant breast tissue is an island of breast tissue usually located in proximity to the normal breast

questions.explanation:
正確答案為 **2**（錯誤敘述）。副乳組織盛行率約 **2-6%**，非 36%。

→ [[accessory-breast-tissue]]
